description:
In this episode of This Is My Architecture - https://amzn.to/2N005W4, Paolo Ferretti of MailUp Group shows us how they have implemented "Messaging API", a system for the creation and management of marketing campaigns delivered via instant messaging applications.

Host: Francesco Marelli, Senior Solutions Architect, AWS
Customer: Paolo Ferretti, Developer Advocate, MailUp Group
